The '''Mawgax''' was a large bipedal [[Diet/Legends|herbivore]] that lived in the forests of [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. It used its sharp beak to defend itself.<ref name="SWG:M" />

==Appearances==
[[File:Mawgax_concept_art.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Concept art for ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.]]
